display.name: Recover the Bell Scout
display.short_description: A bell-runner vanished near a dead tower pocket. The hamlet needs them found before dark closes the road.

rules.briefing_text: The bell scout vanished near the marked pocket. Reach the mark, pull them clear, and the hamlet will open another reward chest.
rules.accepted_text: The marked pocket is live now. Reach it, resolve the danger, then return here for aid.
rules.completed_text: The bell scout made it back. Choose one gratitude reward before you leave.
rules.claimed_text: The bell scout is already home. This request is settled.
